eventDescription.latestDescription:
Your Amazon EKS cluster listed below is running Kubernetes version 1.28, which reached end of standard support on October 26, 2025. After the extended support end date of April 26, 2026, AWS will automatically upgrade your cluster to the next supported Kubernetes version (1.29).

Affected cluster:
  - dndn-eks-cluster (ap-northeast-2)

We strongly recommend that you upgrade your cluster to Kubernetes 1.29 or later before April 26, 2026. Upgrading on your own schedule allows you to test your workloads with the new version and roll back if needed. If your cluster is still on version 1.28 after the end date, AWS will automatically upgrade it during a maintenance window, which may cause brief API server disruption.

To upgrade: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eks/latest/userguide/update-cluster.html
